agent_call: optional: prefer bare agent names like faber; exact calls must match a real Contubernium action file such as faber::IMPLEMENT_BACKEND
lane: optional fallback core lane name: backend | frontend | systems | qa | research | brand | docs (helpers require explicit agent_call or actor)
question: required when action is ask_user

tool_requests.tool: list_files | read_file | search_text | run_command | write_file | ask_user
